author_identification.canonical_name_ar: أبو محمد الحسن بن محمد بن الحسن بن علي البغدادي الخَلَّال
author_identification.scholarly_standing: Prominent hadith scholar and compiler known for his contributions to the field of hadith and its sciences.

scholarly_context.tradition_position: A specialized collection focusing on narrators with only one hadith, contributing to the broader field of hadith criticism and narrator evaluation.
scholarly_context.historical_significance: Valuable for its unique focus on narrators with single hadiths, offering insights into the transmission chains and the reliability of narrators.
